{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323155640ABE3FEE215C8D18D9CB7"}"},"total":122},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7213608119979819836","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大大我很喜欢女主的性子和作者的设定。
就是有些小瑕疵
所以我冒昧提几点意见[快哭了]
①就是女主每次的技能那个描述能不能尽量简洁或者缩短一点，大篇幅的介绍这个看的有点累，也会拖慢剧情节奏。
②还有就是男女主的相处，我感觉大大有点想塑造大女主的感觉，但是既然这本是走感情流不是无cp那种的，我建议大大能多加点男女主的互动和心理转变，从一开始的彼此欣赏到认定彼此这是需要一个过渡的阶段的，所以希望大大还是能照顾一下微弱的感情线。
另外就是快更！我没书看了！大大写的超级好继续努力！爱你么么哒[飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":120,"s":117,"text":"大女主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774252600D18D9CB7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227213608119979819836%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227190668775052545076%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1679549140,"group_id":"7190668775052545076","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一只书虫","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxkGnd7Ui/oepdqX6Gmh3yw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"109405087091","user_name":"用户10940508"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109405087091","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7190668775052545076","book_info":{"abstract":"【统一天下+双向奔赴1V1+修仙式基建】夏冉月穿成了马上登台祈雨的悲催公主，不下雨就咔嚓的那种！幸好她玩过的修仙游戏也穿来了。
祭坛之上夏冉月从容施展法术，百姓感恩叩首
丞相：怒！我刚写好的皇族《罪己诏》
宫中半夜刺客突袭，刺客绕柱走，公主拔剑追
丞相：吐血！我精心培养十年的高手呢！妖女，我要勾结西夷，篡夺皇位！等死吧你！
夏冉月淡定翻看地图：西夷常年犯边，不干人事，是时候把他们抓过来享受697福报了
丞相：反复吐血，已卒！	
粮种易病产量低，法术加速搞杂交，百姓生病无药医，法术炼丹快又好，再造水泥玻璃火药三件套，修桥铺路，造船开海一样不少。
三国并立，敌国觊觎我的成果，找死！
西夷族只有青草连天，欸，牛羊丰腴战马肥，收下！
北凉国只有荒凉冻土，欸，地下矿物煤炭多，收下！
还有小国哭着喊着来投奔求收留。
咦，一不小心就一统天下了。
PS：男主前世权臣，26岁母单，这辈子定位是霸道公主的贴心总助。
最后强调一下，本文是基建文，不是修仙飞升文！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o41233efc0af65fdf223b216a19be268c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"盛时月","author_id":"","book_id":"7190668775052545076","book_name":"惟我独仙：别人宫斗我修仙搞基建","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0c0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":83,"name":"公主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=83&name=公主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":476,"name":"双向奔赴","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=476&name=双向奔赴&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7190668919798137381","read_count":"192","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"690367"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"456","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,系统,种田,穿越,公主,女强,今穿古,双向奔赴","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cf6f485329e0cc64b16b98b43ec228ab~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436600&x-signature=t8fjsTxv8LN24DRVjiA1TR6HBGk%3D","tomato_bo
